what_is_tested: Landmark proper-name override of OCR label
notes: The album's handwritten OCR label reads 'THE STONE BRIDGE BUILT BY THE TURKS', which the model was echoing verbatim. The bridge is Stari Most in Mostar, Bosnia (then Yugoslavia). The eval checks that the model uses the proper landmark name in both the main caption and all per-photo region descriptions, overriding the OCR label.
pass_criteria: Main dc:description contains 'Stari Most' (recognized proper name, not 'stone bridge')
dc:title contains the OCR text 'MOSTAR' or similar OCR from the page
location query (imago:Detections location.query) identifies Mostar or Stari Most

result.description: A collection of vintage photographs showcasing the Stari Most bridge in Mostar, Yugoslavia, from August 1988.
result.ocr_text: MOSTAR,YUGOSLAVIA - AUGUST 1988 THE STONE BRIDGE BUILT BY THE TURKS MOSTAR, YUGOSLAVIA DUBROVNK,YUGOSLAVIA MOSTAR,YUGOSLAVIA

baseline.notes: Before adding explicit OCR-label override rule to Global Style & Behavior Rules and Preamble Page Photo Regions
baseline.description: A collection of vintage photographs showcasing the historic stone bridge in Mostar, Yugoslavia, from August 1988.

photo_regions.name: Photo 1
photo_regions.description: A view of the stone bridge spanning a green river with historic buildings and towers in the background.

photo_regions.name: Photo 2
photo_regions.description: A crowded scene near the stone bridge with a large crowd gathered along the riverbank.

observations: OCR label 'THE STONE BRIDGE BUILT BY THE TURKS' was a dominant signal â€” the model echoed 'stone bridge' even after a generic proper-name rule was added (first attempt)

The fix required two explicit reinforcements: (1) adding 'do NOT use the album's OCR label if it is a generic description. Example: the famous arched bridge in Mostar is called Stari Most' to Global Style & Behavior Rules, and (2) adding an identical override rule to Preamble Page Photo Regions for the region-description step
After the fix, 'Stari Most' appears in the main caption and all three Mostar bridge region descriptions
Generalizes to other famous landmarks â€” the same rule references the Parthenon and Hagia Sophia as examples
